description: Beginner-friendly prompt scenarios that match the mock routes in Config/LLMStore.json.

scenarios.systemPrompt: You are a concise Unreal Engine assistant. Answer in one short paragraph.
scenarios.prompt: Explain in one sentence what the LLM Store does in this Unreal project.
scenarios.tutorialNote: Use this first. It proves that the subsystem, mock provider, model, and default route are working.

scenarios.systemPrompt: You help Unreal Engine artists understand production assets.
scenarios.prompt: StaticMesh'/Game/Props/SM_SupplyCrate.SM_SupplyCrate' has 24k triangles, three material slots, Nanite enabled, and no collision preset.
scenarios.tutorialNote: Shows how a content tool can call a route without caring which model explains the asset.

scenarios.systemPrompt: You summarize technical notes for Unreal Engine leads.
scenarios.prompt: The plugin adds an editor tab, stores provider config in Config/LLMStore.json, stores secrets separately, and exposes Blueprint route execution.
scenarios.tutorialNote: Good for documentation assistants, release note helpers, and producer-facing summaries.

scenarios.systemPrompt: You write short placeholder dialogue for game prototypes.
scenarios.prompt: A tired market trader warns the player that the old bridge is unsafe after the storm.
scenarios.tutorialNote: Shows a narrative route that can later use a different provider or stronger model.

scenarios.systemPrompt: You review Unreal Engine C++ notes with practical, testable advice.
scenarios.prompt: A Blueprint button calls an HTTP-backed LLM route several times in a loop and updates a UMG widget from each callback.
scenarios.tutorialNote: Shows how engineering tools can route review tasks through governance and cost tracking.

scenarios.systemPrompt: You create compact QA checklists for Unreal Engine features.
scenarios.prompt: The settings panel exports LLM Store cost reports to CSV and lets users clear the local response cache.
scenarios.tutorialNote: Shows a production-support route for QA, release validation, and automation planning.
